_doc: Shared constraints cho MỌI A+ banner, áp dụng Type 1 (single-ASIN) + Type 2 (multi-ASIN parent). Loaded by aplus-pipeline.js. Verified qua test SKU TNTD180326i750 (10 banner v3).

aspect.note: AI gen tại 16:9 2K, post-production crop / extend sang 1464x600 Amazon A+ banner spec (2.44:1). Direct 2.44:1 chưa support ổn định bởi nano-banana-pro.

R1_typography_lock.description: Strictly 2 font families throughout EVERY banner, consistent across 5 modules cùng banner + cùng SKU parent.
R1_typography_lock.prompt_snippet: TYPOGRAPHY LOCK: Strictly 2 font families — Font 1 = BALOO 2 BOLD style (rounded friendly sans-serif) for headlines, CTA, callout numbers, stat bars. Font 2 = HANDWRITTEN CALLIGRAPHY ITALIC (Kalam / Caveat) for accent captions, subheadlines, ribbon labels. NO third font. NO traditional serif. NO Helvetica.

R2_product_fidelity.description: Doctrine Chapter 1.1 F1-F8 áp dụng cho MỌI shot có sản phẩm. Type 2 enforce song song N lần cho N child ASINs.
invariants: F2 typography on product (fonts, kerning, letter order, colors)
F4 internal layout (token pattern, acrylic panel, etc.)

process_shots_accuracy.rule: Khi shot là process (laser cutter, workshop, packaging) — KHÔNG phải sản phẩm — vẫn phải chính xác kỹ thuật. Laser cut = CNC machine với red beam + metal gantry, KHÔNG phải pyrography / woodburning / soldering iron.
common_mistakes: AI default hand tool cho 'laser cut' → luôn specify 'industrial CNC laser cutter with RED laser beam, metal frame gantry, NOT handheld tool, NOT woodburning'
AI gen token design simplified → luôn include 'preserve intricate printed design from reference, do NOT simplify'

R2_product_fidelity.prompt_snippet: CRITICAL PRODUCT FIDELITY: Render EXACTLY as reference images — preserve F1 silhouette, F2 typography on product, F4 internal layout, F5-F8 materials+finish+texture+edge. DO NOT redesign, reimagine, simplify token/detail graphics.

R3_scale_anchor.description: Sản phẩm phải render đúng size thực tế so với con người + object tham chiếu.
R3_scale_anchor.method: Prompt phải include scale anchor relative phrase: so sánh với part cơ thể (chest, hand, wrist) + object chuẩn (hardcover book, laptop, letter paper).

examples.reward_jar: 6x8 inches (15x20 cm), size of hardcover book. Khi bé 4-7 tuổi cầm 2 tay, jar phủ CHỈ chest area (NOT torso-wide). Trên bàn cạnh laptop 13-inch, jar ≈ 1/3 đến 1/2 laptop width.
examples.ornament: 3-4 inches (7-10 cm), size of palm. Khi treo trên cây, ornament ≈ 1/3 size bàn tay người lớn.
examples.card: 5-7 inches (12-17 cm), size of envelope. Khi đặt trên bàn, card flat không dày.

R3_scale_anchor.prompt_snippet: SCALE ANCHOR: The product is {size} — {relative_reference}. Realistic proportions: {specific_human_body_relation}. DO NOT render the product oversized. DO NOT let the product dominate the frame beyond its real-life footprint.

R4_per_banner_ref_selection.description: Mỗi module chọn subset refs phù hợp shot, KHÔNG dùng blanket ref set chung cho mọi module.
R4_per_banner_ref_selection.rationale: Test verified: blurry / off-function refs dilute AI attention. 1-ref tổng hợp đôi khi > 3-refs lệch function (case M3 Plan B test v3).
ref_catalog_roles: hero_faceon — clean silhouette + primary features visible
hero_lifestyle — product in natural context (easel, loose parts scattered)
selection_rules: Shot có product + human → 2-3 refs: hero_faceon + lifestyle/detail
Infographic callouts → 2-3 refs: hero_faceon + edge_thickness + lifestyle
Flat-lay gift set → 1-2 refs: hero_lifestyle (chứa scattered components) đủ
Process shots (laser cutter, workshop) → 0-1 ref: chỉ pass ref khi shot có product trong frame, không pass nếu 100% process
Grid multi-product → refs cho MỖI variant pass vào (Type 2)
R4_per_banner_ref_selection.quality_gate: Loại refs blurry / off-axis khỏi default pool. Chỉ include khi shot cần cụ thể edge-thickness hoặc 3D angle.
